## 🎯 Agentic Issue Triage — Needs Manual Review

<details>
<summary>🏷️ Label Decision</summary>

- **Candidate labels considered:**
  - Category `Provisioning` (color #ffeb77) — `Azure.Provisioning.ServiceNetworking` clearly starts with `Azure.Provisioning.*`, matching the "Provisioning" category rule. The `Provisioning` label exists in the repository. ✅
  - Service `ServiceNetworking` — derived from the end of the package name per the pattern `Azure.Provisioning.<ServiceName>`. However, neither `ServiceNetworking` nor `Service Networking` exists as a label in the repository. ❌
- **Confidence blockers:** The service label (color #e99695) required for a valid prediction does not exist in the repository. Category and service labels must always be applied as a pair — applying one without the other is not valid. No alternative service label could be identified with confidence.
- **Outcome:** Applied `needs-triage` — could not confidently predict labels (missing service label)

</details>

<details>
<summary>👥 Owner Routing</summary>

- **CODEOWNERS scan:** Owner lookup was not performed — label prediction did not reach confidence threshold.

</details>
